chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-702 of 2023 (Rahib Ali Miatlo Vs. The State & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 5945/2023 (Stay) 12-01-2024. Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ******** It was alleged by the private respondent that the applicant obtained from him money to get her son appointed in police department, which he failed to do. By making such allegation, she sought for direction against the police to record her FIR, it was issued accordingly by learned IVth Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur vide order dated 03-10-2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court. If for the sake of argument, it is believed that the alleged incident has taken place then it constitutes an offence of cheating which could be proved adequately by the private respondent by having a recourse u/s 200 Cr.P.C; consequently, the impugned order is set aside. The instant Crl. Mist. Application is disposed of accordingly together with listed application. JUDGE Nasim/P.A 2
